backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven Java version property to target JDK 21.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against JDK 17, failing to utilize JDK 21 features or enforce JDK 21 compatibility.

backend/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Jib Maven plugin base image to use a JDK 21 runtime.
backend/pom.xml.why_exists: Using a JDK 17 base image for a JDK 21 application can lead to runtime compatibility issues or missing features expected by the newer JDK.
